curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which adds datetime format validation in index.js within the plugin.start function, specifically inside the stream.onValue callback. The only other JS file (run.js) is a development runner script and does not contain the same vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class command-injection is correct: CWE-78 matches the unsanitized datetime input interpolated into a shell command executed via spawn('sh', ['-c', ...]).
